chapter_title.en: Reward of trimming one’s nails and moustache

text: أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ وَ قَصَّ شَارِبَهُ فِی کُلِّ جُمُعَهٍ- ثُمَّ قَالَ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَ بِاللَّهِ وَ عَلَی مِلَّهِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ص أُعْطِیَ بِکُلِّ قُلَامَهٍ عِتْقَ رَقَبَهٍ مِنْ وُلْدِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 6.  Imam   Ja’far   Sadiq   (a.s.)   says,   “One   who   recites Bismillaahi wa billaahi  wa a’laa millaati rasoolillaah while trimming  nails  and  moustache  on  Friday  would  get  the reward of freeing a slave from the progeny of Ismail (a.s.) for each hair and nail trimmed.”
